chunks.text: WICSE 30th Anniversary event at UC Berkeley on Wednesday, January 30. The program includes a panel discussion titled 'Shattering the Glass Ceiling: Career Advancement for Women Engineers' at 5:00pm in 290 Hearst Mining Building. The session focuses on Women in Engineering: Mental Toughness.

Alumnae speakers include Rula Deeb, Ph.D. (Senior Associate at Malcolm Pirnie), Marie Ann Neimat (Vice President at Oracle Computers), Nina Taft, Ph.D. (Senior Research Scientist at Intel Research Laboratory), and May Su (Vice President/General Manager at Aviza Technology). The moderator is Frances Allen, IBM Emerita.

Refreshments will be served after the panel. The event is co-sponsored by the Graduate Women of Etcheverry (GWE), Julia Morgan Engineering Program (JMEP), Women in Computer Science and Electrical Engineering (WICSE), and the EECS Department. Special thanks to the sponsors.
